description.tr: UK operations and customer contact; loading schedules and paperwork.
description.en: UK operations and customer contact; loading schedules and paperwork.

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Phone: +44 20 7946 0958 · Email: info@hanbroscargo.co.uk · Sample address: 123 Kingsway, London WC2B 6NH (confirm current address before visiting).
